title: Need a standard template for project financial tracking that stands up to what good looks like
excerpt: We should not have to reinvent standard basics templates that usually come with a PPM, example financial workbook that allows you to track CAP Ex and Op Ex items by month, quarter and years.  Budget, Planned, Estimate to…

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: We should not have to reinvent standard basics templates that usually come with a PPM, example financial workbook that allows you to track CAP Ex and Op Ex items by month, quarter and years. Budget, Planned, Estimate to Complete, Estimate at complete. Also have the ability to set and if needed switch currencies.
